fields.description: Display name for this commission rule
fields.label: Rule Name

fields.description: Unique identifier code for this rule
fields.label: Rule Code

fields.description: Type of commission rule
fields.label: Rule Type
fields.options:
Standard
Category Based
Seller Tier Based
Volume Based
Promotional
Seasonal
Flash Sale
New Seller
VIP Seller
Custom

fields.description: Tenant this rule belongs to (blank for platform-wide)
fields.label: Tenant

fields.description: Higher priority rules are evaluated first (1-1000)
fields.label: Priority

fields.description: Use as default rule when no other rules match
fields.label: Is Default Rule

fields.description: Detailed description of when and how this rule applies
fields.label: Description

fields.description: What this rule applies to
fields.label: Apply To
fields.options:
All
Category
Seller
Seller Tier
Product Type
Listing
Order Value Range
Quantity Range

fields.depends_on: eval:doc.apply_to!='All' && doc.apply_to!='Order Value Range' && doc.apply_to!='Quantity Range'
fields.description: Specific value for the apply_to filter
fields.label: Apply To Value

fields.description: How to match the apply_to value
fields.label: Operator
fields.options:
Equals
Not Equals
In List
Not In List
Contains
Starts With

fields.description: Filter by product category
fields.label: Category

fields.description: Filter by seller tier
fields.label: Seller Tier

fields.description: Filter by seller type
fields.label: Seller Type

fields.description: Filter by product type
fields.label: Product Type

fields.description: Type of condition matching
fields.label: Condition Type

fields.description: Minimum order value for rule to apply
fields.label: Min Order Value

fields.description: Maximum order value for rule to apply (0 = no limit)
fields.label: Max Order Value

fields.description: Minimum quantity for rule to apply
fields.label: Min Quantity

fields.description: Maximum quantity for rule to apply (0 = no limit)
fields.label: Max Quantity

fields.description: Python expression for custom condition (use ctx.order, ctx.seller, ctx.listing)
fields.label: Custom Condition

fields.description: How commission is calculated
fields.label: Commission Type
fields.options:
Percentage
Fixed Amount
Percentage + Fixed
Tiered
Custom Formula

fields.description: Commission rate as percentage (e.g., 10 for 10%)
fields.label: Commission Rate (%)

fields.description: Fixed commission amount per transaction
fields.label: Fixed Commission

fields.description: Minimum commission to charge
fields.label: Minimum Commission

fields.description: Maximum commission to charge (0 = no limit)
fields.label: Maximum Commission

fields.description: What to base commission calculation on
fields.label: Calculation Base
fields.options:
Order Total
Subtotal
Item Price
Net Amount

fields.description: Exclude shipping cost from commission base
fields.label: Exclude Shipping

fields.description: Exclude tax from commission base
fields.label: Exclude Tax

fields.description: Exclude platform discounts from commission base
fields.label: Exclude Discounts

fields.description: Include seller-funded discounts in commission base
fields.label: Include Seller Discounts

fields.description: Date from which this rule is effective
fields.label: Effective From

fields.description: Date until which this rule is effective
fields.label: Effective Until

fields.description: Rule has no end date
fields.label: Is Perpetual

fields.description: Days of week this rule applies (JSON array, e.g., [1,2,3,4,5] for weekdays)
fields.label: Day of Week Restrictions

fields.description: Time of day when rule starts (HH:MM)
fields.label: Time Start

fields.description: Time of day when rule ends (HH:MM)
fields.label: Time End
Restricted to Sellers
fields.description: Seller profiles this rule is restricted to
[DEPRECATED] Restricted sellers (JSON) - use Restricted to Sellers table instead
fields.label: Restricted to Sellers (Legacy)
Excluded Sellers
fields.description: Seller profiles excluded from this rule
[DEPRECATED] Excluded sellers (JSON) - use Excluded Sellers table instead
fields.label: Excluded Sellers (Legacy)
Restricted to Categories
fields.description: Product categories this rule is restricted to
[DEPRECATED] Restricted categories (JSON) - use Restricted to Categories table instead
fields.label: Restricted to Categories (Legacy)
Excluded Categories
fields.description: Product categories excluded from this rule
[DEPRECATED] Excluded categories (JSON) - use Excluded Categories table instead
fields.label: Excluded Categories (Legacy)

fields.description: Allow higher priority rules to override this rule
fields.label: Can Be Overridden

fields.description: Minimum priority required to override this rule
fields.label: Override Priority Threshold
Override Roles
fields.description: Roles that can override this commission rule
[DEPRECATED] Override roles (JSON) - use Override Roles table instead
fields.label: Override Roles (Legacy)

fields.description: Allow this rule to stack with other rules
fields.label: Stacking Allowed

fields.description: Maximum number of rules that can stack with this one
fields.label: Stack Limit

fields.description: Number of times this rule has been applied
fields.label: Usage Count

fields.description: Total commission generated by this rule
fields.label: Total Commission Generated

fields.description: Average commission per application
fields.label: Average Commission

fields.description: Total GMV processed with this rule
fields.label: Total GMV Processed

fields.description: Date this rule was last applied
fields.label: Last Applied

fields.description: Last order this rule was applied to
fields.label: Last Applied Order

fields.description: Internal notes about this rule
fields.label: Notes
